name: Suspicious File Transfer Using Replace
description: Detects the use of replace.exe to transfer files, which can be indicative of malicious activity.

parameters.name: timestamp
parameters.description: The timestamp of the process creation event.

parameters.name: event_id
parameters.description: The Windows Security Event ID for Process Creation (4688).

parameters.name: process_name
parameters.description: The name of the process that was executed, which should be 'replace.exe'.

parameters.name: process_path
parameters.description: The full path to the replace.exe executable.

parameters.name: command_line
parameters.description: The full command line used to execute replace.exe, including '/a' or '-a'.

parameters.name: user
parameters.description: The user account under which replace.exe was executed.

parameters.name: host
parameters.description: The hostname where the event occurred.
